item.title:

Movement v spacing
How Armagh stre
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 24min The tactics board is back out for championship
Movement v spacing
How Armagh stretched the Tyrone press
Getting out with a spare man and why 5 yards can be better than 25 when it comes to kickout movement 1 7 1 mil
